products.name: Organic Honeycrisp Apple
products.description: Sweet and crisp organic apples grown in the cool highlands of Chiang Rai. Perfect for snacking or baking.

products.name: Nam Dok Mai Mango
products.description: Thailand's most prized mango variety — intensely sweet, fibre-free, and aromatic. Ripened to perfection.

products.name: Fresh Pineapple
products.description: Juicy and tangy Thai pineapples, freshly harvested and trimmed. Great for juices, smoothies, or eating fresh.

products.name: Seedless Watermelon
products.description: Crisp, sweet, and ice-cold-ready seedless watermelons. A Thai summer staple.

products.name: Ripe Papaya
products.description: Buttery, orange-fleshed papayas, rich in vitamins A and C. Enjoy with a squeeze of lime.

products.name: Dragon Fruit (White)
products.description: Mildly sweet white-flesh pitaya with a striking pink skin. High in antioxidants and fibre.

products.name: Rambutan
products.description: Jewel-like red rambutans with juicy, translucent flesh and a sweet-tart flavour.

products.name: Longan
products.description: Delicate and honey-sweet longans, known as the 'dragon eye' fruit. Perfect as a fresh snack.

products.name: Baby Roma Tomatoes
products.description: Plump, vine-ripened Roma tomatoes bursting with umami sweetness. Ideal for salads, sauces, and roasting.

products.name: Organic Broccoli
products.description: Tightly-budded organic broccoli heads, rich in fibre, vitamin C, and iron. Stays crisp and green.

products.name: Baby Carrots
products.description: Sweet, crunchy baby carrots washed and ready to eat. Great raw, roasted, or in soups.

products.name: Chinese Cabbage
products.description: Tender napa cabbage with mild, slightly sweet flavour. Essential for Thai soups and stir-fries.

products.name: Fresh Spinach
products.description: Tender young spinach leaves, triple-washed and ready to cook. Packed with iron and folate.

products.name: Japanese Cucumber
products.description: Thin-skinned, seedless Japanese cucumbers with a fresh, mild flavour and satisfying crunch.

products.name: Shimeji Mushrooms
products.description: Delicate white shimeji clusters with a mild, nutty flavour. Perfect for hot pots, stir-fries, and pasta.

products.name: Sweet Potato
products.description: Golden-fleshed sweet potatoes with natural sweetness that deepens when baked or steamed.

products.name: Lemongrass
products.description: Freshly cut lemongrass stalks with a bright citrus-floral aroma. The backbone of Thai curries and soups.

products.name: Kaffir Lime Leaves
products.description: Fragrant double-lobed leaves essential for authentic Thai curries, soups, and marinades.

products.name: Thai Holy Basil
products.description: Peppery, clove-scented holy basil — the star of Pad Kra Pao. Wilts quickly so use fresh!

products.name: Galangal
products.description: Firm, peppery rhizomes with a pine-citrus punch. Indispensable in Tom Kha and Thai curry pastes.

reviews.author: Somchai P.
reviews.title: Best mango I've ever had
reviews.body: Incredibly sweet and fragrant. Arrived perfectly ripe with no bruising. Will definitely order again next season!

reviews.author: Naphat W.
reviews.title: Very good quality
reviews.body: Sweet and flavourful, though two pieces were slightly underripe. Overall happy with the purchase.

reviews.author: Pimchanok T.
reviews.title: Fresh and crisp
reviews.body: The broccoli arrived vibrant green and tightly closed. Stayed fresh in the fridge for almost a week. Great for stir-fries.

reviews.author: Krit A.
reviews.title: Super fragrant!
reviews.body: These lemongrass stalks are so aromatic — my Tom Yum turned out amazing. Very fresh and great value.

reviews.author: Wanna S.
reviews.title: Crunchy and sweet
reviews.body: Really enjoyed these apples. Slightly on the smaller side but the flavour is excellent. Packaging was secure.

reviews.author: Siriporn K.
reviews.title: Perfectly ripe and juicy
reviews.body: The pineapple arrived at exactly the right ripeness — sweet all the way through with barely any tartness. Great for making smoothies.

reviews.author: Tanawat B.
reviews.title: Fresh and flavourful
reviews.body: Really good pineapple. One of the three was a little underripe but the other two were excellent. Will order again.

reviews.author: Nattaporn C.
reviews.title: Incredibly sweet and crisp
reviews.body: Best watermelon I have ordered online. Ice-cold from the fridge it was perfect. No seeds, pure sweetness.

reviews.author: Kanokwan S.
reviews.title: Great value for the price
reviews.body: Very sweet and refreshing. A little smaller than expected but the flavour was spot on. Good for the whole family.

reviews.author: Phatchara L.
reviews.title: Buttery and smooth
reviews.body: The papaya was nicely ripe with a beautiful orange flesh. A squeeze of lime makes it perfect. Arrived well-packaged.

reviews.author: Voravit M.
reviews.title: Good but one was overripe
reviews.body: Two out of three were excellent — very sweet and creamy. One was slightly overripe. Overall still a good purchase.

reviews.author: Supawan T.
reviews.title: Stunning and delicious
reviews.body: The pink skin was vibrant and the white flesh was perfectly mild and refreshing. High in fibre too. Will definitely reorder.

reviews.author: Rattana P.
reviews.title: Nice quality, subtle flavour
reviews.body: Good dragon fruit — fresh and not too sweet. Great for a fruit salad. Packaging kept it safe during delivery.

reviews.author: Chaiwat N.
reviews.title: Juicy and beautiful
reviews.body: These rambutans are stunning — bright red and perfectly ripe. The flesh was translucent and sweet with just a hint of tartness. Amazing.

reviews.author: Monrada J.
reviews.title: Best rambutan I have tasted
reviews.body: Incredibly fresh — you can tell they were picked recently. Sweet, juicy, and the seed came off cleanly. Ordered twice already.

reviews.author: Piyawan S.
reviews.title: Honey-sweet and delicate
reviews.body: When these were in stock they were absolutely wonderful. Like little drops of honey. Hope they restock soon!

reviews.author: Thanapon R.
reviews.title: Worth the wait
reviews.body: Managed to get some before they sold out. Very fresh and sweet. The dragon eye nickname is well deserved — beautiful fruit.

reviews.author: Anchana W.
reviews.title: Perfect for my pasta sauce
reviews.body: These Roma tomatoes are incredibly flavourful — rich, umami-sweet, and thick-fleshed. Made the best homemade sauce with them.

reviews.author: Suphatra K.
reviews.title: Fresh and plump
reviews.body: Great quality tomatoes. Very ripe and juicy. A few were slightly soft on arrival but still perfectly usable. Good price.

reviews.author: Wiparat C.
reviews.title: Great snacking carrot
reviews.body: Washed and ready to eat — very convenient. Sweet and crunchy. Kids loved them with hummus. Will be a regular order.

reviews.author: Araya N.
reviews.title: Super fresh and sweet
reviews.body: These baby carrots are genuinely sweet — not the bland ones you get at supermarkets. Roasted beautifully with a little honey.

reviews.author: Kanchana B.
reviews.title: Good for hot pot
reviews.body: Tender napa cabbage with a mild flavour. Perfect for our weekly shabu-shabu. Arrived fresh and well wrapped.

reviews.author: Nalinee T.
reviews.title: Fresh and versatile
reviews.body: Used it for both stir-fry and soup this week. Held up well in the fridge for several days. Nice mild flavour.

reviews.author: Sompong A.
reviews.title: Perfectly triple-washed
reviews.body: Ready to use straight from the bag. Leaves are tender and vibrant green. Wilts quickly so cook it fast — excellent flavour.

reviews.author: Jiraporn V.
reviews.title: Great quality spinach
reviews.body: Fresh young leaves with no yellowing. Made a lovely garlic spinach stir-fry. Wish the bunch was slightly larger for the price.

reviews.author: Worawan P.
reviews.title: Crisp and refreshing
reviews.body: Thin-skinned and seedless as advertised. Great in salads and fresh rolls. Very crunchy — stayed fresh for five days.

reviews.author: Noppadon S.
reviews.title: Good everyday cucumber
reviews.body: Mild flavour and satisfying crunch. Perfect for a quick snack with dipping sauce. No seeds makes it much more enjoyable.

reviews.author: Patcharee K.
reviews.title: Incredible in hot pot
reviews.body: These shimeji clusters are so delicate and flavourful. Added them to a hot pot and they soaked up the broth beautifully. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Somsak T.
reviews.title: Nutty and delicious
reviews.body: Pan-fried with butter and garlic — absolutely amazing. Very fresh with no slimy ones in the pack. Will order every week.

reviews.author: Ladawan C.
reviews.title: Sweet and caramelised when baked
reviews.body: Baked them at 200°C for 45 minutes and they were perfectly caramelised. Natural sweetness is incredible. Hope they restock soon.

reviews.author: Yupaporn M.
reviews.title: Best sweet potatoes I have had
reviews.body: Golden flesh that is incredibly sweet when steamed. Great texture — not stringy at all. Hoping to see them back in stock.

reviews.author: Surasak L.
reviews.title: Essential for Thai cooking
reviews.body: The fragrance of these kaffir lime leaves is unmatched. My Tom Kha and green curry both turned out restaurant-quality. Truly fresh.

reviews.author: Malai W.
reviews.title: Fragrant and beautifully fresh
reviews.body: Arrived in perfect condition — bright green and intensely aromatic. Froze half the bunch for later use. Outstanding quality.

reviews.author: Boonsong P.
reviews.title: Pad Kra Pao was perfect
reviews.body: Used these for Pad Kra Pao and the peppery clove aroma was exactly right. Very fresh — wilted fast once cooked but that is how it should be.

reviews.author: Chalermpol N.
reviews.title: Fresh holy basil, great flavour
reviews.body: Strong peppery scent right out of the bag. Used it the same day for stir-fry. Leaves were intact with no wilting. Good value.

reviews.author: Pensri T.
reviews.title: Firm and intensely aromatic
reviews.body: The galangal rhizomes were firm and fresh with a beautiful pine-citrus punch. My Tom Kha turned out incredible. Will reorder.

reviews.author: Usa B.
reviews.title: Great for curry paste
reviews.body: Used this in a homemade red curry paste alongside lemongrass and kaffir lime. The flavour was deep and authentic. Very fresh quality.
